title: T-092 — Schema amendment: BOM single source of truth (NPD draft → Technical approve)
prompt:
Amend the existing `bom_headers` and `bom_lines` schemas (currently owned by 03-TECHNICAL) to support NPD as the originator of BOM records — making `bom_headers/bom_lines` the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for all BOMs. The legacy NPD computed BOM view must be retired in favor of direct rows.

Deliverable:
- Verify `bom_headers.status` enum supports the lifecycle: 'draft' → 'in_review' → 'approved' → 'active' → 'superseded' → 'archived'. If 'draft' or 'in_review' missing, ADD via Drizzle pgEnum extension migration.
- Add `bom_headers.origin_module` enum ('npd' | 'technical' | 'imported') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'technical' — populates 'npd' for NPD-originated rows.
- Add `bom_headers.fa_id` (UUID NULL) FK reference for NPD draft phase (so an FA in dev maps directly without a separate computed view); when product graduates to FG, fa_id remains for traceability and `product_id` gets populated.
- Constraint: at least one of (`product_id`, `fa_id`) must be NOT NULL — CHECK.
- Index: `bom_headers_fa_id_idx` (partial WHERE fa_id IS NOT NULL).
- Drop or deprecate (mark VIEW DEPRECATED in JSDoc) the legacy NPD computed BOM view; do NOT remove the SQL VIEW definition in this task — only mark it. Removal happens in T-093 migration after API switches over.
- Migration: `0092_bom_single_source_of_truth.sql`.

RED schema tests:
- bom_headers exposes new origin_module enum + fa_id column + draft/in_review status values.
- CHECK ((product_id IS NOT NULL) OR (fa_id IS NOT NULL)) blocks INSERT with both NULL.
- Inserting status='draft', origin_module='npd', fa_id=<uuid>, product_id=NULL succeeds.

Do NOT modify bom_lines column shape (lines link to header_id and remain as-is). Do NOT remove the NPD computed view yet. Do NOT migrate existing data (T-093 handles back-fill).

Close-out: paste migration filename, schema diff, test output.

pipeline_inputs.description: Amend bom_headers to support NPD-originated draft BOMs with fa_id link + origin_module + lifecycle.
pipeline_inputs.details: Extend status enum, add origin_module, add fa_id FK, add CHECK + partial index, mark legacy NPD computed view DEPRECATED. No data migration here.
acceptance_criteria: Given the migration applies, when bom_headers is introspected, then origin_module enum is present with values ('npd','technical','imported') and fa_id column exists.
Given an INSERT with both product_id NULL and fa_id NULL, when committed, then it fails the CHECK constraint.
Given an INSERT with status='draft', origin_module='npd', fa_id=<uuid>, product_id NULL, when committed, then it succeeds.
Given the lifecycle test, when transitioning draft → in_review → approved → active, then no enum violation occurs.
Given the legacy NPD computed view is grepped, when run, then a DEPRECATED JSDoc/comment is present.
test_strategy: Update RED schema test to cover origin_module, fa_id, CHECK constraint, lifecycle enum values.
Run `pnpm vitest run` + `pnpm drizzle-kit generate` + `pnpm tsc --noEmit`.
risk_red_lines: Do not drop the legacy view in this task — back-fill in T-093 first.
Do not weaken FK constraints on product_id.
